dj_text: Gentlemen? Rizz level: high. Jeg Er Sulten? Rizz level: MAXIMUM!
commercial_text: Brought to you by NoodleCorp — we put noodles in everything. Noodle soup. Noodle salad. Noodle coffee. Noodle mattress.
hijack_text: Hey there, lovelorn souls across all dimensions!
recovery_text: I swear someone left the interdimensional frequency door open.
title: Jeg Er Sulten
